recommendations.title: Red Scorpion
recommendations.overview: A Soviet commando is sent to eliminate a rebel leader in Africa.  Soon he finds himself doubting his mission.

recommendations.title: Invasion U.S.A.
recommendations.overview: A one-man army comes to the rescue of the United States when a spy attempts an invasion.

recommendations.title: Friday the 13th: The Final Chapter
recommendations.overview: After his revival in a hospital morgue, Jason fixes his vengeful attention on the Jarvis family and a group of hitherto carefree teenagers.

recommendations.title: The Prowler
recommendations.overview: Thirty years after a murder on the night of Avalon Bay's graduation dance, the sleepy town's teens meet grisly ends at the hands of a prowler once thought to be a jilted soldier home from war.

recommendations.title: Apocalypse Now
recommendations.overview: At the height of the Vietnam war, Captain Benjamin Willard is sent on a dangerous mission that, officially, "does not exist, nor will it ever exist." His goal is to locate - and eliminate - a mysterious Green Beret Colonel named Walter Kurtz, who has

recommendations.title: Missing in Action 2: The Beginning
recommendations.overview: Prequel to the first Missing In Action, set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s, and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp, and his plans to escape.

recommendations.title: The Quest
recommendations.overview: Ghang-gheng, the ancient winner-take-all competition in which the deadliest fighters from around the world employ the most spectacular feats of martial arts skills ever displayed in order to win the prized Golden Dragon. But fighting prowess alone wi

recommendations.title: Cast Away
recommendations.overview: Chuck Noland, a top international manager for FedEx, and Kelly, a Ph.D. student, are in love and heading towards marriage. Then Chuck's plane to Malaysia crashes at sea during a terrible storm. He's the only survivor, and finds himself marooned on a

recommendations.title: Wonder Woman
recommendations.overview: An Amazon princess comes to the world of Man in the grips of the First World War to confront the forces of evil and bring an end to human conflict.

recommendations.title: Street Fighter
recommendations.overview: Colonel Guile and various other martial arts heroes fight against the tyranny of dictator M. Bison and his cohorts.
